item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
item.description: As heat waves and wildfire smoke sweep the country, see where it could be affecting you on the map and what you can do to curb the health risks.

media:content.media:text: An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
An animated GIF that shows the forecast for the wildfire smoke from Canada over 36 hours
Wildfire Smoke Sunrise in New York City
media:content.media:description: Wildfire smoke from Canada shrouds the sun as it rises behind the skyline of midtown Manhattan in New York City on Friday as seen from Jersey City, N.J.

item.title: Maps: Wildfire smoke forecast for the Midwest and northern U.S.

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday pledged to hold Canada responsible for costs associated with unhealthy air quality in the U.S. due to spreading smoke from the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:text: The sun is obscured by wildfire smoke as people stop to photograph the Washington Monument and Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, Friday, July 17, 2026.
media:content.media:description: The sun is obscured by wildfire smoke as people stop to photograph the Washington Monument and Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, Friday, July 17, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Wildfire Smoke Sunrise in New York City
media:content.media:description: Wildfire smoke shrouds the sun as it rises behind the skyline of midtown Manhattan on Friday.

item.title: Trump fumes over Canadian wildfire smoke and issues tariff threat

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Ashley Mowreader
item.description: Lionel Messi leads La Albiceleste back to the World Cup final, the House tries changing the clock, and health officials look for the cause of the cyclosporiasis outbreak.

media:content.media:text: Various photos in a grid format of a dinosaur skeleton, a clock, and a scene from Jurassic Park

item.title: Life and death in the Senate, and a dinosaur’s $50 million payday: The news quiz

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: For American viewers of the World Cup final on Sunday, the sport the rest of the world knows as football will closely resemble the one Americans call the same name.

media:content.media:text: 10 men in blue t-shirts carrying giant white letters spelling FIFA
media:content.media:description: Workers placing a FIFA logo on the pitch ahead of a match between France and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J. last month.

media:content.media:text: Shakira on stage wearing a tassled red costume.
media:content.media:description: Workers placing a FIFA logo on the pitch ahead of a match between France and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J. last month.

item.title: How the World Cup final is starting to look a lot like the Super Bowl

item.dc:creator: Jo Yurcaba
item.description: The life and death of May Pollard, 16, provides a window into the tragic effect that legislation and political rhetoric have had on trans people in America.

media:content.media:text: A memorial candle engraved with May's name and a heart; Elyse Thorpe sits on May's bed.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: May Pollard's mother and brothers hands cradle a photo of May.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Elyse Thorpe sits on May's bed holding a stuffed animal loved by May.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: A large trans flag and other pride flags on display outside of the State Capitol.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: May Pollard as a young child in a stroller.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: May Pollard after beginning her transition as a teenager.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Joe Pollard stands near a green-leafed tree at a home in Boise.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:credit: Natalie Behring and Hannah Yoon for NBC News
media:content.media:text: Elyse and Axel under a tree near their home; Joseph Pollard closes his eyes in the sunlight.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Joseph Pollard and May take a selfie.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Emi and May at the arcade.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Emi Erwin near pinball machines.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Eulogy notes written by Elyse for May's funeral; a lit candle engraved with "May" and a heart.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: A mints container in a cup holder in Joseph Pollard's car.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

media:content.media:text: Elyse Thorpe holds a framed photo of May.
media:content.media:description: May Pollard's mother, Elyse, and brother, Axel, hold a photo of May at home in Boise, Idaho, in June.

item.title: Idaho pushed anti-trans laws for years. Then a teen died.

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: Critical water and power infrastructure sites have been damaged as the U.S. and Iran continue to trade strikes, while the parched Middle East reels from temperatures of 100 degrees and beyond.

media:content.media:text: Climate Iran Desalination
media:content.media:description: The Mina Al-Ahmadi oil refinery operates in Kuwait, March 20, 2026.

item.title: Iran and Kuwait report attacks on water and power infrastructure as strikes escalate

item.description: For American viewers of the World Cup final on Sunday, the sport the rest of the world knows as football will closely resemble the one Americans call the same name.

media:content.media:text: 10 men in blue t-shirts carrying giant white letters spelling FIFA
media:content.media:description: Workers placing a FIFA logo on the pitch ahead of a match between France and Senegal in East Rutherford, N.J. last month.

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
item.description: After hearing from detainees about the power of playing soccer, a legal aid group convened an annual tournament where former detainees and advocates have found community.

media:content.media:text: Jugadores del equipo "Los Huelgadores" en un partido durante el torneo 2026.
media:content.media:description: Players from The Strikers team play during the 2026 CCIJJust Goals tournament.

media:content.media:text: Serafín Andrade y Pedro Ayón en el torneo "Just Goals".
media:content.media:description: Players from The Strikers team play during the 2026 CCIJJust Goals tournament.

media:content.media:text: "Los Huelgadores", uno de los equipos de personas inmigrantes que participa en el torneo "Just Goals".
media:content.media:description: Players from The Strikers team play during the 2026 CCIJJust Goals tournament.

media:content.media:text: El logo diseñado por Juan, un inmigrante detenido en California City, para el equipo "Los Huelgadores".
media:content.media:description: Players from The Strikers team play during the 2026 CCIJJust Goals tournament.

item.title: A soccer tournament in California is helping immigrants heal after ICE detention

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Two U.S. Forest Service employees were rescued with the help of negotiators after being zip-tied and held hostage for nearly 15 hours in Shasta-Trinity National Forest in Northern California, officials said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Mount Shasta in the Shasta-Trinity National Forest.
media:content.media:description: Mount Shasta in the Shasta-Trinity National Forest.

item.title: Two U.S. Forest Service employees rescued after being held hostage at gunpoint

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Delman
item.description: I tested more than 50 beach products with my kids on three different beach days and these are the ones that made transport, cleanup and sun safety easy.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Daniel Landesman Photography; Kara Birnbaum / NBC
media:content.media:text: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: We overpacked the first two times
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Stylish and safe, she barely noticed she had on a lift vest.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Swimways makes safety gear that's actually adorable.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: We loaded the kids into the Voya and rolled through the sand; no walking, no complaints.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The add-on sand wheels on the Veer Cruiser made it so smooth through the sand.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Comfy and sturdy, the Yeti Hondo is a total game changer for sitting in the sand all day.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Izimini Booster chairs are cute and easy to set up, buckle for safety and come with a tray for meal time.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Daniel Landesman Photography; Courtesy Becca Delman
media:content.media:text: Yeti's cooler kept our food cold all day, and the backpack design made it so easy to haul across the sand.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Brush off the sand before you leave the beach — the Shakalo Sandscreen really works.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Lozi & Gabe's pop-up tent is big enough for the whole crew, plus every bag we brought along.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Aveeno sunscreen blended right in and felt weightless — sunscreen he didn't even notice.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The Bogg Bag fits everything, then wipes clean in seconds. No more sandy tote bags!
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Compact and leakproof, the Weezie is exactly what you want for a quick wet-item stash.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: These Aloha pouches saved the day — wet, sandy clothes went straight in, everything else stayed clean.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Packed once, fed all day — this Lalo bento box pulled its weight.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Water stayed cold all day in the Yeti rambler, even after hours baking in the sun.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: The Pehr Swim two-piece made it fun and comfy for her to play in, and was easy to get her in and out of.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Customize your Native Jefferson shoes with Dekko Stickers.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Caden Lane's sun hat kept his face out of the sun all day and didn't budge even mid sandcastle-building.
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

media:content.media:text: Warm and cozy for the baby, straight out of the water and into this Poncho towel
media:content.media:description: Taking small children to the beach can be more stressful than fun, but the right beach products can help ease the process.

item.title: The 25 must-haves that make beach days with kids easier

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: Prime members can get three months of Standard Audible for free. The member-exclusive deal also includes $20 in credits to spend on titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

media:content.media:text: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.
media:content.media:description: Audible is one of our favorite platforms for streaming audiobooks and has millions of titles.

item.title: Amazon is offering free months of Audible — but only for Prime members

item.title: Two U.S. Forest Service employees rescued after being held hostage at gunpoint

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
item.description: Hundreds of people came to pay their last respects to the Mexican father of three who worked in construction and had lived in the U.S. for 35 years.

media:content.media:text: Public Viewing And Funeral Held For ICE Shooting Victim Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: Ronaldo Salgado
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

media:content.media:text: People embrace as they pay their respects to Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a candlelight vigil on July 08, 2026 in Houston, Texas.
media:content.media:description: People gather outside the Forest Park Lawndale funeral home during the public viewing of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on Friday in Houston, Texas.

item.title: Anguish and disbelief at wake for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, killed by ICE in Houston

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham, R-S.C., in the special election to fill her late brother’s Senate seat for a full term.

media:content.media:text: Darline Graham Nordone places her hand on a bible and raises the other as she's sworn in, her husband stands next to her, and Chuck Grassley holds the bible as well standing across from her
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham to run for a full term to replace her late brother, Lindsey Graham, as the Republican nominee for Senate in South Carolina.

item.title: Trump backs Sen. Darline Graham in primary to replace her late brother

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: Her exit prompted Milwaukee County Executive David Crowley to revive his campaign and jump back into the wide-open Democratic primary in the battleground state.

media:content.media:text: Governor candidate Sara Rodriguez
media:content.media:description: Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez had been seen as one of the leading candidates in a crowded Democratic primary field for Wisconsin governor.

item.title: Wisconsin Lt. Gov. Sara Rodriguez drops out of the governor’s race

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Bridget Bowman
item.description: Nebraska Democratic Senate nominee Cindy Burbank has submitted a letter requesting her name be removed from the ballot, a move that would set up a one-on-one matchup between Republican Sen.

media:content.media:text: Cindy Burbank.
media:content.media:description: Cindy Burbank.

item.title: Democrat moves to drop out of Nebraska’s Senate race, clearing path for independent

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
Maggie McCabe
item.description: A historic hub for free speech and protest is under the spotlight as the Trump administration proposes adding permanent fencing around Lafayette Square.

media:content.media:text: Trump Military Parade
media:content.media:description: The proposal is the latest in a series efforts by the Trump administration to reshape prominent landmarks in Washington.

item.title: Federal panel signals it could support permanent fencing around White House park known for protests
